title: Stewart
compiled_truth: Stewart is an external contact at [Mallia](companies/mallia). Over the corpus period (2000-11-06 to 2002-02-05), Stewart sent 35 and received 19 emails, totalling 54 interactions. Top correspondents: [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (33), [Tina' 'Triolo](people/tina-triolo) (15), [Home' 'Reid](people/home-reid) (13), [Walters' 'Kevin](people/walters-kevin) (12), [Korth' 'Eric](people/korth-eric) (11).
